image:image.image:title: Intebwio Default Search Interface
image:image.image:caption: Intebwio main search interface showing the slogan 'The browser that writes itself' and AI toggles.

image:image.image:title: Intebwio Dynamic Data Visualization
image:image.image:caption: Intebwio generating an interactive line chart showing the Evolution of Maximum Train Speeds.

image:image.image:title: Intebwio Core Philosophy
image:image.image:caption: The Intebwio landing page with a purple gradient background and the text 'Stop searching. Start generating.'

image:image.image:title: Intebwio Complex Bar Charts
image:image.image:caption: Intebwio bar chart showing Computing Speed Evolution for early computers like ENIAC and Colossus.

image:image.image:title: Intebwio Technology Under The Hood
image:image.image:caption: Intebwio About page detailing features like Semantic Understanding, Knowledge Synthesis via Gemini models, and Dynamic Layouts.

image:image.image:title: Intebwio Elegant Dark Theme
image:image.image:caption: Intebwio search interface shown in an elegant Dark Mode theme.
